body_txt: Near opposite of the Dirty Old Man or Dirty Old Woman , where a kid is ridiculously young, but still has some signs of... "interest". What's most notable is that often, kids or babies are allowed to cop a feel, simply because it's said that they don't understand what they're doing . Note that there seems to be some level of Double Standard , since most of the examples seem to be male . When growing a bit, he becomes the Hormone-Addled Teenager . Sub-Trope of Troubling Unchildlike Behavior . Compare to Likes Older Men , Likes Older Women , Mrs. Robinson , and Stacy's Mom . May result in Age-Gap Romance or Teacher/Student Romance . See also Kid-anova , which deals more with the romantic aspects, as opposed to the sexual ones. Fille Fatale is for a female child acting sexually promiscuous. For the more common and innocent version, see Precocious Crush . Contrast Oblivious Pervert , which a child might be if they do perverted actions out of innocence rather than sexual desire. The Anime Fanspeak term for this kind of kid is erogaki . Not to be confused with The Pig-Pen , who is dirty or filthy in the literal sense.
